title: Recursive Data Structure Generation
scenario: Write a Python function that creates a nested dictionary representing a recursive data structure. The function should take a list of key-value pairs as input and return the nested dictionary. The function should be able to handle edge cases such as an empty list or a key-value pair with a null value. Limit the output to 150 lines.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the code is syntactically correct.
Verify that the function works correctly for different inputs.
Evaluate the readability and maintainability of the code.
